title: Property Consultant - Gaurs Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Gaurs Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Gaurs Group has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Ranchi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Gaurs Group:
Gaurs Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gaurs Group!
